requirements.title: SM Root Structure
requirements.description: The state machine root shall hold a pointer to the current state.
requirements.rationale: Provides a reusable application framework pattern for structured embedded software.

requirements.title: State Root Structure
requirements.description: Each state shall embed a module root with an API vtable, a pointer to the owning SM, and a next-state option.
requirements.rationale: Provides a reusable application framework pattern for structured embedded software.

requirements.title: State API Interface
requirements.description: Each state API vtable shall define StateAction, ShouldExit, and ResetState operations.
requirements.rationale: Provides a reusable application framework pattern for structured embedded software.

requirements.title: SM Initialization
requirements.description: The state machine shall initialize with a start state and failure handler.
requirements.rationale: Provides a reusable application framework pattern for structured embedded software.

requirements.title: State Initialization
requirements.description: A state shall initialize with a link to its owning SM, an API vtable, and an optional next state.
requirements.rationale: Provides a reusable application framework pattern for structured embedded software.

requirements.title: Get Current State
requirements.description: The state machine shall return the current state pointer.
requirements.rationale: Provides a reusable application framework pattern for structured embedded software.

requirements.title: State Transition
requirements.description: The state machine shall transition to the next state when the current state's next-state option is present.
requirements.rationale: Provides a reusable application framework pattern for structured embedded software.

requirements.title: No Transition When None
requirements.description: The state machine shall remain in the current state when the next-state option is absent.
requirements.rationale: Provides a reusable application framework pattern for structured embedded software.

requirements.title: SM Verification
requirements.description: The state machine shall verify that its root and current state pointer are non-NULL.
requirements.rationale: Provides a reusable application framework pattern for structured embedded software.

requirements.title: State Verification
requirements.description: Each state shall verify that its API vtable and owning SM pointer are non-NULL.
requirements.rationale: Provides a reusable application framework pattern for structured embedded software.

requirements.title: Next State Pointer Verification
requirements.description: Each state shall verify that the next-state pointer is non-NULL when the next-state option is marked present.
requirements.rationale: Provides a reusable application framework pattern for structured embedded software.
